title: Dream Dimensions
description: Explore 9 surreal dimensions in your sleep to collect unique crystals and craft the ultimate power-granting Dream Orb
body:
# 🌌 Overview
Have you ever wondered if your actions during the day affect what you dream at night? This mod introduces **9 unique, surreal dreamcore dimensions** that are completely empty of any mobs but full of mystery. Explore procedurally generated anomalies, solve the mystery of your daytime triggers, and craft a legendary artifact that grants you god-like permanent status effects!

---

# ✨ Core Features

### 🛏️ Enter the Dream
You don’t need to build expensive portals or hunt down rare ingredients to start your journey. Just go to sleep in a normal bed! However, the specific dream dimension you visit depends entirely on your specific actions during the Minecraft day. 

*   **Need a clue?** Check your **Advancements Tab** for cryptic hints on how to trigger specific dream sequences.

### 🏜️ Surreal, Mob-Free Exploration
The dream dimensions are eerie, peaceful, and entirely devoid of hostile mobs. Instead of fighting for your life, your challenge is exploration and navigation:

*   **Varying Landscapes:** Some dimensions feature isolated structures holding deep secrets.
*   **Endless Anomalies:** Other dimensions are massive, infinite procedurally generated structures that go on forever.

### 💤 Conquering the Dream
To "defeat" a dimension and escape back to reality, you must navigate its surreal corridors or landscapes until you locate a bed hidden within the dream. Once you find it, simply right-click it to wake up!

### 🔮 The Ultimate Reward
Defeating a dimension rewards you with a unique, colored **Dream Crystal**. While these crystals are strictly used as crafting ingredients, gathering all 9 of them allows you to forge the absolute ultimate item: **The Dream Orb**. 

Holding or carrying the completed Dream Orb grants your player permanent, game-changing buffs:

*   ⚡ **Speed IV**
*   📏 **Extended Reach** (an extra 5 blocks of distance)
*   👁️ **Night Vision**
*   🍃 **No Fall Damage**

---

# ⚙️ Technical Info
*   **Standalone Experience:** This mod has absolutely zero external dependencies. Just drop it in your mods folder and play!
*   **Minimalist Additions:** Keeps your inventory clean by adding only 9 distinct Dream Crystals and the final Dream Orb artifact alongside the custom world generation.

# 🎵 Music
This mod features a custom soundtrack to enhance the surreal atmosphere.
* **Artist:** All music is composed by **[Meydän](https://freemusicarchive.org/music/Meydan/)**.
* **License:** Licensed under **[CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)**.
* **Tracks:** Includes selections from the albums *[Havor](https://freemusicarchive.org/music/Meydan/Havor)*, *[Ambient](https://freemusicarchive.org/music/Meydan/Ambient_1860)*, and *[For Creators](https://freemusicarchive.org/music/Meydan/For_Creators)*. 

*A full tracklist and attribution details can be found in the `CREDITS.txt` file included with the mod.*
